column1: # engine_labels.csv - engine function LABEL registry (attribution + names).
# Distinct from config/symbol_names.csv (the byte-MATCHED set that drives src/).
# These are LABELS: real names + classes + prototypes attributed to v1.0.0.76
# engine functions from two sources. They graduate into symbol_names.csv + src/
# only when actually byte-matched. Used to grow the partition + guide matching
# and applied into build/ghidra-named (the comprehension DB) for readable decomp.
#   tomalla     - refs/tomalla-gruntz manual annotations harvested for v1.0.1.77
#                 via the v0.76<->v0.77 patch offset map (build/patch-diff/
#                 17 piecewise offset levels). 52 v1.01-CHANGED funcs are skipped.
#   rtti-vptr   - ctor/dtor discovered by xref to ??_7<Class>@@6B@: a function
#                 Attributed to the most-derived class (last vptr store in a ctor).
#   rtti-vtable - dtor body reached via the vftable slot-0 vector-deleting-destructor
# (Class virtuals are already labeled Class::vfunc_N in build/ghidra-named by the
#   confidence: high=unique attribution; med=ICF-folded / multi-vftable function.
